title: potentilla peduncularis var. shweliensis
intro: Potentilla peduncularis var. shweliensis is a variant of the Potentilla peduncularis plant, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and commonly known as a species of cinquefoil. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Potentilla peduncularis var. shweliensis include its ability to support immune function, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
